title: Losullivan
compiled_truth: Losullivan is an external contact at [Isda](companies/isda). Over the corpus period (2000-09-07 to 2001-10-16), Losullivan sent 8 and received 45 emails, totalling 53 interactions. Top correspondents: [Elizabeth Sager](people/elizabeth-sager) (4), [Mark E Haedicke](people/mark-e-haedicke) (2), [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (2), [Christophe Chassard](people/christophe-chassard-rwetrading) (1), [Brenda Whitehead](people/brenda-whitehead) (1).
